race.comment: Open race in the last but we'll stick with CAFE MILLENIUM (1) who will find this easier. The win two back over Sabaj and Birdman is excellent form, then running on Super Saturday last time in G3 company on a day that heavily favoured those on speed and near the fence. He ran the fastest last 600/400m of the race from an impossible spot, and while he's found his niche at 1400m, a mile shouldn't be an issue. He'll need some luck but the early price appeals. TAKEN (12) is off a let up having struggled over 2000m last time as favourite. Don't mind him back in trip here. AL DUCA (19) ran well fresh at 1400m and can improve up in trip. CHIEF LITTLE ROCK (14) is off 2 years but has top class formlines overseas, although the apprentice from the carpark perhaps says no.
